reviews.review_text: Great caravan park well run and nice and quiet very clean
Schöner Campingplatz mit schattigen Stellplätzen. Alles sauber
Etwas in die Jahre gekommen aber hat eine gute Lage und alles, was man braucht.
Right on the beach, great spot for our 3 day stay.
Overlooking at the beach

Fantastic location across from the beach and a short stroll for food. The camp kitchen and facilities were great and made for a social feeling within the camp. Note, if you are camping the ground is rock solid and tent pegs don’t make a dent in the flooring of the sites. Make sure you bring rope with you if you can tether off instead

We stayed in a standard cabin, paid over $600 for 3 nights in early May 2026. The cabin didn't resemble the one we had seen on the website, the one we stayed in should not have charged more than $130 per night. The cabin  needed renovation and looked  dirty. There was a plastic cover on the dining table which had yellow marks on it & it was sticky like something had been spilt on it and not cleaned up. On the floor, at the bottom of the dining table leg was a splot of gunk that had not been mopped. There was brown markings in the bathroom which looked disgusting. There was no smart tv, even though one was advertised. We messaged the Manager Jo, while we were there about these concerns on day 1  and did not get a response.  We did stay at the Tudor Holiday Park in Kalbarri for one night and highly recommend it above this one.
Clean,  tidy caravan park.   Great location and the showers were excellent.   Had a shower,  toilet,  sink and bench all in the one room.   Plenty off hooks and shelves.
位置很不错，就在海边，设施也比较齐全，但相比summerstar 园区内可玩的内容比较少
Great drive through sites. A bit squashed close together but.
Lovely campsite in a great location

Walked in on the day to ask for a powered site. Both staff behind the desk were so friendly but Lisa was incredible. I had had zero sleep due to hearing a mouse in my van the night before (not here, elsewhere) Lisa checked me in early and found me a site right next to the amenities. The groundsman came to check on me and Lisa even gave me some of her eucalyptus oil to help with the mouse issue. Facilities are clean and the sites are well kept.
Lovely park, clean facilities, friendly and helpful staff. Our site was quite hot but we were a late booking so no complaints. Great location, close to everything, thank you!
Beware of putting your bags on the beds. We were charged an extra $40 as they believed the beds were used. Other than that the park is good.
Spent 2 days, 61 aud each day, powered with 2 adults

We booked for 2 nights through the insane heatwave! We were put on a site with zero shade (in a camper with no ac!!)
We moved to another site with a smidge of shade - they were ok with it. Location is bloody fabulous- right by the river, the pelican feeding, shops, servo!
The bathrooms were ok - door was a bit dodgy and lots of bugs, but were fine. They had a powercut for a while (i think it may have been the whole of Kalbarri)
We had to leave a night early due to the unbearable heat and they absolutely wouldnt budge on refund/ transfer/ date change etc. bit annoying.
Would recommend still
It's a nice e park

Shout out to Vince, help us 3 girls who were in a jam retrieving our keys from behind the cabinets of our camper. Without him and his exception service we would be out of pocket and missing parts of the trip.

Really great caravan park, very well maintained and the sites have enough privacy to feel like you are on holiday and not that you are sleeping in someone's back yard. Would definitely come back again.
This holiday park is beautiful & has friendly helpful staff:)
Siempre paramos en los Tasman. La atención super amable y flexible con nuestras comodidades para estar cerca de la cocina. Super atentos. La duchas privadas y excelentes.

Had a wonderful stay at this holiday park. We were greeted in a lovely manner after hours on the road and welcomed warmly. Lots of communication the day of arrival and detailed information provided about amenities and facilities.
We loved the location, close to tge beach, tge sunset views and the local food stores.
Best experience we could have had, Thank you!

Good service at reception checking in
Ammenities really clean
Good shady spots for camping and caravan with ample site space

My wife, pooch and I stayed from 2nd - 6th Dec 25. We loved our stay here. We were camping on an unpowered site.
There was some shade from the trees, but there was more shade on the powered sites.
The location is great, right in the centre so a short walk to the cafes, hotel, shop and beach.
The amenities were nice and clean along with the BBQ's and camp kitchen.
The staff were great, they let us put the freezer blocks in the ice freezer which was a great help!
The site was nice and quiet with everyone respecting the 10pm quiet time.

We would recommend this to our friends and family as a good place to stay. When we next come to Kalbarri we will staying here again.

We booked this park because we had an excellent experience with Tasman in Hervey Bay. Unfortunately, this park does not live up to the overall Tasman quality. The bathrooms are clean but very outdated and rusty. The beachfront sites are located right next to the main road – it really feels like sleeping on the street. The kitchen is not equipped at all; no pots or pans are provided, so you have to bring everything yourself. On the positive side, the receptionist is very friendly and the park’s location is good. That’s why we give it 3 stars.

We left our CC details upon booking, but they resold the room before we arrived. We gave them a call night before they said NOTHING available AND refused to give a refund of first night as I had agreed to the conditions.
OF COURSE I DID! But NOWHERE  does it say I MUST RING them 3 days before to confirm I’m coming!

Who else does that! That is so bizarre, makes me think something’s wrong with them.
And there is! The regional manager supported them. BEWARE of TASMAN holiday parks.

Travellers expect accomodation to follow their booking terms and conditions too. We rely on it!

This video is me giving them a letter of demand. We found alternative accommodation thru AirBnB but it ruined our perception of Kalbarri.
When I said to friends I was going to Kalbarri I wish they had asked me “why?”
Based on my experience I wouldn’t bother.

We were crammed in when only 1/4 full so on top of each other.

Told quite assertively we could not check in 20 mins early and made us park down the road. This was apparently due to watering of the sites however no drive through sites were watered during our stay.  With 18 drive through sites available 4 sites were crammed in side by side with our awning almost touching the next van. The visitors on the other side spoke loudly and slammed car doors at 530am before leaving. This could have been avoided if we were spaced out.

Everyone else was spaced out in the park.

Grey water disposal was right in front of our sitting/eating area in the middle of our 2 vans and smells when the neighbours showered etc.

We understand if the park was full but it was no where near full and off peak season.

Will not visit again.
Perfect site. Lovely shaded pitch, great facilities and super friendly staff ensured we had a great stay. This was the best site we stayed on during our travels in WA

We are booking 2 story villas.
The villas is 350m. to IGA and lot of the restaurants nearby.
The room is good accept no air conditioners in the bedroom.
I think maybe very hot in summer.
But all the things here can say very good.

The site was confusing to navigate, the lot we were on was in was smushed into a corner space, and the showers desperately need to be refurbished.
Also we had trouble with a monster of a man spying on my young niece and he was not immediately removed from the site.

Ein etwas in die Jahre gekommener Campingplatz, aber sauber. An der Rezeption war man freundlich, aber als wir den uns zugewiesenen Stellplatz beanstandeten, weil er schräg, uneben und sehr klein war, war die Dame sehr unwillig und ohne Verständnis. Widerwillig gab sie uns einen anderen, nicht ohne dabei zu betonen, dass der Campingplatz ausgebucht sei. Dies war jedoch nicht der Fall. Der Platz war maximal 60% gefüllt. Zudem hatten wir 2 Nächte gebucht.
Ansonsten ist die Lage des CP gut - dicht am Strand und an der täglichen Pelikan-Feeding Station.

Very unpleasant ending to an otherwise nice stay.

We stayed here for two nights and everything was great until the final moments. Unfortunately, the park is extremely strict with departure times, literally down to the minute.

We took part in the park run in the morning, which was actually advertised at reception. We got back to our site right at 10am, quickly filled our water tank, and planned to drive to the dump point before leaving. While doing so, a lady walked over with a rude tone and asked, “What are you doing here?” We explained we were just filling up water and then heading off, which she agreed to. We were a bit taken back by the question considering it was right on 10am.

After the run, we wanted to shower, so instead of holding up the site, we drove across the road to the beach carpark and walked back over to use the showers, only to be yelled at by another lady that was taking photos of me, our vehicle and saying, “You can’t shower there.” I explained that we’d paid to stay, and after telling me that I wasn't allowed to park and walk over to shower, she very reluctantly allowed me to continue.

To top it off, a friend who visited us briefly was told by a staff member that she couldn’t use the toilet because she wasn’t a paying guest.

We’ve stayed at many caravan parks, and we’ve never experienced such a severely strict approach to checkout times or basic amenities. A disappointing end to an otherwise good stay, a little friendliness and nicer questioning would have gone a long way. We were twice made to feel like we were breaking into the park.

Tasman Holiday Park Kalbarri – 5 Stars (and a Bonus Pelican!)

From the moment we rolled into Tasman Kalbarri, we were greeted like long-lost friends who’d finally found the good life. The check-in was smooth, friendly, and efficient — no forms that needed a degree to complete, and no judgment when I asked where the bottle shop was.

Our site? Absolutely fantastic. Front-row views of the Indian Ocean, the kind of sea breeze that makes you feel like you’re in a shampoo commercial, and sunsets so good they should come with applause. The Wobbly Wagon felt right at home — level ground, power at the ready, and enough space to swing a BBQ tong or two.

Amenities were spotless and regularly cleaned — clearly by someone with military precision (I should know). Even the showers had that magical balance of hot water and good pressure — rare as a quiet pelican at feeding time!

In summary: friendly staff, great location, and facilities that make you forget you’re camping. We’ll definitely be back — and next time, we’re bringing extra bubbles to celebrate another perfect Kalbarri sunset.

From the moment we rolled into Tasman Kalbarri, we were greeted like long-lost friends who’d finally found the good life. The check-in was smooth, friendly, and efficient — no forms that needed a degree to complete, and no judgment when I asked where the bottle shop was.||||Our site? Absolutely fantastic. Front-row views of the Indian Ocean, the kind of sea breeze that makes you feel like you’re in a shampoo commercial, and sunsets so good they should come with applause. The Wobbly Wagon felt right at home — level ground, power at the ready, and enough space to swing a BBQ tong or two.||||Amenities were spotless and regularly cleaned — clearly by someone with military precision (I should know). Even the showers had that magical balance of hot water and good pressure — rare as a quiet pelican at feeding time!||||In summary: friendly staff, great location, and facilities that make you forget you’re camping. We’ll definitely be back — and next time, we’re bringing extra bubbles to celebrate another perfect Kalbarri sunset.||||⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ — “Wobbly Wagon Approved!”

Great Tasman Park centrally located in Kalbarri, so you can walk to nearly all town attractions, including Finlays brewery. Excellent range of sites, we chose a drive through at the back of the park which had a hard stand for the annex and was quite. Toilet facilities are cubicals with shower and toilet together, which is great for families with you kids.
Facilities are immaculate. The staff are friendly and helpful and we appreciated them allowing early check-in.
We will go back again. Loved our time there.
Very thankful fitting us in without booking B4 school holidays. Nice quiet park, close to town with donger style bathrooms.
Great place to park up my RV. Close to everything.
Great park, nice amenities, across the road from the beach and a nice hotel nearby with great Lobster on the menu. We found the Tasman parks to be of a good standard

Exceptional service, reception staff very helpful to the point of leaving a birthday card and chocs on the table when we arrived. The unit was right across the road from the river front where the pelicans are fed daily. Thoroughly enjoyed and recommended. Exceptional.
Good size drive thru sites, internal rds a  drainage need some work. Helpful friendly staff

Before you book here for Kalbarri||It’s likely you’ll be cancelled, ripped off and sorry||||For months I had booked. The night before they cancelled my booking. Made no apology or offer, and intending to keep the deposit like its common practice. Their fraudulent business practice they suggested applied to all Tasman Holiday Parks. I doubt that when they dishonour basic contract law, have no respect for customers, their rights as consumers and ignore the poor image they bring to their brand and their area.

For months my stay was paid in Kalbarri,
They cancelled to profit, left me bitter and sorry.
Before you book, just pause and beware,
Their fraudulent ways will show they don’t care.

Campeggio consigliato.
Bagni puliti anche se singoli.
Le griglie sono pulite.
Great place to bring your caravan to. Clean and tidy with friendly helpful staff
Walking distance to town and shops. Hence, well located for those staying in Kalbarri. Very clean park, and good ensuite style ablutions.

There for a week but got placed at the back . Very tight bays ok for 1 or 2 nights but not a week . Had tvs going both sides that I could hear. To close. Won’t be back if there is a chance of being placed there again. Older part much bigger bays .

Lovely park, opposite the beach, magnificent sitting at the BBQ area, glass in hand, watching the sunset over the water.
Friendly, helpful staff and good clean amenities.
Staff should be proud of the job they do

We enjoyed the park, clean and staff friendly.The only downfall, we have an outside fridge and alcohol was stolen  also my shampoos which I had left on the table and my lovely shower bag which was on the line. The park is not fenced and there is a backpackers hostel across the road.They were walking in and out of the park all the time. The police even did an extra patrol that night.
Good quality caravan park, centrally located in Kalbarri, good daily service of ablution blocks and solid care factor from staff.
Good location just opposite the foreshore, near to pelican feeding. Well maintained facilities and toilets.
Spent 2 days in camping site, that was an amazing place as close with everything and the facilities are clean
Good spot.  Close to everything.

A great place to stay in our Van
.
Bardzo miła obsługa 😀 Świetna lokalizacja! Kuchnia i sanitarny spełniły nasze oczekiwania. Słaba jakość WiFi.
Friendly staff with a great camp kitchen and very clean toilets/ showers

We had a great stay in the 2-bedroom standard cabin. While the cabin is quite old and run down, and could definitely use a refurbishment (especially the curtains and some rusty marks on the walls), it still offered a decent experience for the price.

We had a clogged toilet, but management responded immediately and fixed it, which we really appreciated. The brand new LCD TV was a nice touch—we enjoyed a few movies during our stay. The kitchen was well equipped, and the hot water shower worked just fine.

The laundry facilities could use an upgrade—only one dryer meant a bit of a wait. However, the reception staff were very friendly, especially with our kids. They even gave us a fun treasure hunt activity, which was a lovely gesture.

At $250 per night, the accommodation is affordable, but next time we’d probably opt for the 2-bedroom deluxe cabin for a more updated experience. The location is fantastic—very close to the Pelican feeding at 8:45 AM and the Pelican Beach Café.

Overall, a good stay with great service and location—just needs a bit of TLC.

We recently had an overnight stay in Kalbarri. If I was planning our trip again, I would have stayed longer in this town, which is in a beautiful location by the river and the sea. There is a lot is see and do in this area.|The Tasman Holiday Park is a very large establishment and given the number of caravans and motor homes there, its is very popular. We stayed in one of their "deluxe" cabins.|The cabin was very roomy, full size kitchen, fridge, stove, lounge, small bathroom and two bedrooms, A/C.. Not sure where the luxe fits in, as it was all fairly basic, but certainly perfectly functional and ideal for a holiday.|The check in was efficient with the ladies at reception making certain we understood all the rules that needed to be observed, and we had to sign a form acknowledging same. Other than that, they were helpful and gave us some tips where to eat.
Large ensuite/loos. Cheerful staff. Short walk to cafes and CBD and waterfront.
Really nice people
Great location very good amenities right on the beach.
Nice place. Super busy due to school holidays. Don't forget to empty your own bins (apparently not included in the price).
Very well maintained park.

Beach view site should have a disclaimer as it is 2 metres away from the main road without any fence. It was very loud with cars zooming past all night and people walking home from the pub, it was impossible to have a decent sleep. I would recommend this caravan park but very disappointed that they falsely advertise the “beach view” site.

Other amenities are okay, bathrooms could be updated but the camp kitchen is clean and staff friendly.
Opposite the beach where the pelicans are fed every morning. Sites a bit tight but ok.
Lovely friendly staff, cabins excellent.
Nice and clean park. Drive through van parks are a bonus.
The campsite road is abit of a maze, the site we had was cramped and on the pricey side however amenities were clean
Atención al cliente espantosa. La mujer estaba muy ocupada y no tenía ganas de atender. Nos quiso cobrar 60 aud por la noche a un campervan cuando ya hablamos con el resto de personas y dijeron 30.

Probably the best run tourist park I have stayed at. It was super busy but we didn't feel crowded. Facilities are great, clean and well maintained. The staff are friendly, helpful and every site is cleaned at every change over. Yes cleaned, rake the sand pick up anything dropped and check everything is working. We will be back.

We, & our motorhome, were parked right next to the amenities, which suited me, & the dump point, which was ok as it was behind a partition.
The amenities were very clean & each cubicle had a toilet, shower & wash basin! A mini bathroom all to yourself!
The park was huge & full, so it was a bit noisy during the evening, but nights were very quiet.
Our site was huge & although not a lot of shade & nowhere near the beachfront other reviewers have mentioned.

good park for camper, friendly and approaching staff are great addition to its center location. with beach right at front. toilet n shower are clean n maintained to high level for its remote location. can be a bit confuse when drive inside the park coz its most unpaved road doesnt look quite clear compare to the map they supplied. aviod arrival after dark for first timer.

OK|Where's the toilets and showers ???|Miles away to walk at night 🌙 |A massive big Caravan park with not enough facilities.|Sites 156, with only 10 toilets/showers per block.|Three blocks One block closed 2 open.|Only one basic camp kitchen|With a great name Tasman Holiday Parks Kalbarri|Expected so much more!!! ☹️☹️☹️

We weren’t told when we booked our site that there wouldn’t be any power for the whole day not sure why they didn’t inform us
What happens if you have medical problems and need power
Very poor

We loved the Tasman Holiday Park in Kalbarri! The location is amazing! We are from Germany & never been to such a lovely place. The receptionist Trina is amazing! She was passionate about our wellbeing & the site was great.

We took a last-minute trip to Kalbarri and didn’t have a place to set up our tent. Even though the phone connection was poor, they were very kind and advised us to come directly to the site. When we arrived, the lady at the reception was extremely helpful and welcoming. The campground has amazing facilities — a convenient laundry, clean bathrooms and showers, and a well-kept shared kitchen. The spot we rented had a power outlet and a beautiful view of the starry sky, which made the experience even more special. We’d definitely come back!

Great location and facilities. The family amenities are great, room to move and especially excellent if you have little kids to shower. Almost like being at home in your own bathroom!

Camp kitchen could do really do with some ovens and extra cooking facilities, but quite good overall. Since Tasman have taken over there’s been a few updates - can’t wait to see what they do for our next annual visit!

Sounds like Rachel has stubbed her toe the day she stayed at Tasman we have stayed here for many years and they have always had a great bunch of staff that would do anything for you wouldn’t holiday anywhere else

An unhinged experience I wouldn’t wish on anyone.

Walked into reception in great spirits—after all, I’m on holiday. With a smile, I simply told the lady at reception that my room didn’t look like the pictures online and politely asked if there were any other cabins available that looked more like the photos (what’s the harm in asking, right?).

Before she could even properly respond, an older woman with black hair stormed out from the back and barked “What’s going on?” Instead of actually relaying my calm, reasonable question, the receptionist blurts out, “She said the room doesn’t look like the photos.” Nice way to throw me under the bus.

Without skipping a beat, the old woman launches into a bizarre tirade—talking over me, mind you—saying that the photos online were “taken in the same room you’re in,” and that it only looks different because “the linen is different.” Right. Because a full downgrade in bathroom style, bed structure, and aesthetic can all be chalked up to… linen?

Her tone was aggressive, hostile, and honestly,  unhinged. She then offered—no, more like threatened—to refund me and told me I could leave. I hadn’t even expressed dissatisfaction. I was simply checking if the modern cabin pictured was available. Apparently asking a question is now a criminal offense at this establishment.

What’s truly wild is being lied to so blatantly. I had just come from the room. I had the pictures in front of me from their website. To say they look the same is pure delusion or deception—maybe both. Did they downgrade the bathrooms? The spare room? The bunk beds? Because none of it resembled the polished, minimalist aesthetic shown online.

To be clear: I wasn’t complaining. I wasn’t angry. I wasn’t confrontational. I just asked a question. The response? Instant hostility, gaslighting, and being spoken to like trash.

The woman’s behavior? Erratic, aggressive, and quite frankly, unstable. I now understand the other reviews that mentioned “the crazy old lady.” I should have paid more attention to them. If you value honesty, calm communication, and basic professionalism, I strongly advise staying elsewhere.

Very deceiving & abusive experience to say the least. Below are some accurate photos (Yes that is a rusty bed frame in the back outside) again, I never said there was anything wrong with the room.

And to the lady: next time, try asking the customer what they actually said before launching into a bizarre defensive damenour. Just a thought. Very strange customer service & honestly abusive.
Awesome staff, very accommodating on a last minute booking, gave us a great spot to get out van into, highly recommend staying there.

Stayed here for a few nights and from check in to check out it was brilliant, very friendly and accommodating staff.  Amenities were very clean as well as the grounds.  Spacious parks for caravans and couldn't be in a better location to beach, pubs and shops.  Would have to say so far out favourite spot on our trip.

The location is absolutely fantastic, offering stunning views of the beach and right in the centre of town, an easy walk to shops/restaurants. The park is well-maintained, and I was particularly impressed with the cleanliness of the bathrooms and toilets. It's clear that the staff take great care in keeping everything in top shape. Highly recommended!
We stayed in our Avan. Great park close to the beach and amenities , good for families to enjoy,we  will stay there again.
Well equipped powered camping site, right near the water, plenty of clean and tidy amenities. Friendly service. Plenty of BBQs!
Great spot for camping, close to the beach and you have coffee shops nearby.

Wij hebben hier voor een nachtje geslapen. De staanplaats was prima qua grote en de voorzieningen waren goed.

De badkamers zijn echt super, zo heb je allemaal kleine prive badkamers in plaats van douchehokjes. Erg goed bedacht.

Kleine minpuntjes: veel poep van kangoeroes (wellicht harken?) En de speeltuin kan wel een renovatie gebruiken.
Schöner Campingplatz. Freundlicher Empfang. Straße überqueren und schon ist man am Meer. Tankstelle mit Shop in der Nähe. Telstra-Netz

We only met the best treatment at this park, both from the lady at the office - and from the gardener :-) |There are many big trees that offer shade to campers, amenities were fine, and we were paid visits by both emus and kangaroos near our camper. There is a fine beach just across tre road.
Bellissimo

Lovely caravan park in the middle of town and very close to the national Park. Had to extend our stay as the national park was closed because of the annual cull when we arrived which hadn't been posted anywhere but Trina in reception was so lovely and welcoming. We arrived late so I called to let them know and Trina again couldn't have been more helpful or lovely. Emu, kangaroos, lizards and loads of other wildlife about which was lovely.
Amenities are old but clean and what you need.
Would highly recommend a stay and hope to be back in the future

Apart from the wind, which you have no control over, our stay here was very pleasant. The sites are all well maintained.  Whilst the pool was very inviting on those hot days, there was no shade to get out of the hot sun, and the pool surrounds need to be fixed. It's a shame the trees had to be trimmed so much as they were good shade trees . Despite these points, I would definitely stay here again.

My first stay at a Tasman Park was delightful. The check-in was fast  friendly, and the bowl of candy was great. I stayed in a very clean deluxe two bedroom villa. The AC was on in the villa when I arrived and a container of cold water in the fridge. There was AC in both the main bedroom and living area. Very quiet and comfortable! Easy walking distance to beach, pelican feeding, and restaurants. Thanks Jo and Trina.
Very nice location and a good campsite
Hmmmm very cramped, steep in price. Location is awesome. Very central.
Been the last 3 Easter’s in the duluxe cabins, no issue with the service but won’t be returning this Easter prices have been jacked right up , almost double what we were paying in 2022,

Un grand camping, bien placé, restaurants et super marché à 600m. Plage en face, super calme pour les enfants. Le camping est beaucoup plus rempli que les autres de la côte. Sanitaires très propres. Nous avons payé 55$ en janvier 2025 pour un emplacement avec électricité. C'est un peu cher.
This was remarkably busy (booked out) but remarkably clean nonetheless;

Great camp and clean toilets
Came late but easy check in
Close to the beach
We will come back

Great location, near beach and near lots of great lookouts, river cruise etc. Facilities in the park is really great, its big park and was not crowded when we were there. Enjoyed our time. Good spot to spend couple of days with family

Great location
Super friendly staff at check in
Walk to Iga  / pub etc is 5 mins max
Super clean facilities
10c recycling every where
Lots of bins etc
Really clean sites even had a couple of Roos chilling next to me one day
오토캠핑장으로 좋은 편이다.
This is a reasonable caravan park. Some of the sites are not very big and ours looked onto the entrance to the gents so you don't necessarily get great views. The amenities were ok.
Best chalets in town.

We had a deluxe cabin which was strangely cheaper than a standard one! Great location next to the beach the pelican feeding spot! Our cabin was spacious and comfortable. Good laundry facility onsite. Plenty of food options in town in the evening. Nearby Kalbarri NP was stunning!
Campsite was average . I think it would be very squashed in summer !
It's a great camp-site.  Lots of trees for shade and Central to everything.  We've been coming here for years and intend to do so for many more years.  Staff are great too 👍

Really amazing place with the beach and the road alongside the beach.
The small village is the right one that I am dreaming of spending my time when I am getting older.
My wife also told me the same feeling!!
Really amazing and want to stay more than 1 week in this spot!
Camping with the nicest showers. The bathrooms are designed in a way, that you actually have a whole room for yourself with a toilet and shower in it. Top!

Ein sehr schön angelegter Campingplatz. Besonders erwähnenswert sind jedoch die unglaublich freundlichen Mitarbeiter. Wir hatten ein Problem mit unserem Wohnwagen und John(?) war sofort zur Stelle und hat somit unsere Reise gerettet, ohne etwas dafür haben zu wollen. Wir sind unendlich dankbar!
Die Lage ist perfekt für Kalbarri - alle Sehenswürdigkeiten und Aussichtspunkte sind super erreichbar. Die Pelikanfütterung ist direkt gegenüber. Sehr empfehlenswert.

$90 per night for an unpowered site?
$100 if you want power?
Tell him he’s dreaming!
Nice park. Friendly and helpful staff. Good location with an easy walk to the shops or supermarket.
Great service and great staff

We have been there twice this year non peak periods and found prices are increasing every  time with nothing changing to justify. Noticed that in other Tasman parks and will give them the flick unless no choice in the future. Well over priced now but everything is clean and organised. Maybe partly because who owns them in my opinion

Fantastic. Loved it.
I will be back
Friendly staff and very clean. Nice and quiet as well.
Plenty of showers one section showers are small another ney built are much better
Just a nice place to stay and nothing was a problem. Fantastic access to the river mouth and right in-between all the action

This holiday park has the perfect location, right in front of the beach. The amenities are always clean, individual showers and toilets, kitchen, BBQ. Campsite in general is quite pretty.
The only downside was the wind, the area where we stayed (6/7) was extremely windy during the night. Something that could be fixed with some kind of fence.
However we had a great time and would definitely recommend 👏🏻

We had a wonderful time in Kalbarri, with friendly and helpful staff. Centrally located near IGA, Restaurants and Chemist. We did experience bad weather for 1 day. Waking up to heavy rain and wind I forgot I had washing on the line. I found it all dry, folded and under cover.... thankyou to the staff member for rescuing my washing. Can't wait to go back.
Very busy but very relaxing

We booked in for 2 nights & extended our stay. The park is in a great location with shops nearby & the beach across the road. The amenities are spotless & we loved the open door idea.
The office staff are exceptional, friendly & professional, they couldn't do more to make our stay any better, returning our calls when we were delayed due to the highway being closed for 17 hours etc
What more can we say just a wonderful place to stay, so quiet & the sound of the waves at night was amazing.

Sanitäter und Hütten sehr altbacken. Generell zu wenig Sanitäranlagen für die Campingplatzgrösse. Personal nett, aber unflexibel. 7.00 bis 18.00 Uhr hört man die Sandmaschine aus dem Fluss, unangenehm laut. Angeblich läuft diese Maschine immer im Winter. Abwasser läuft einfach in kleine Gräben ab, ökologisch bedenklich.

The photos of the flood posted are a result of a freak down pour of 140mil of rain and the water from back of town running into the park. In the 9 years at the park have never seen this happen before.

Beautiful place to stay very accommodating,
Staff friendly and helpful.
Would definitely stay again thanks 🙏 everyone
What a great caravan park, friendly staff, good toilets and showers, enjoyed our stay and we will come back!

Great caravan park. We stayed on a caravan site with water, power and grey water at the site just for us. They spaced us out which was great, had a site in-between our neighbours, and saw this throughout the park. The Camp kitchen and ablution blocks had everything we needed, nice and clean, and everything worked great. Good shower pressure too! Location is in the middle of town, opposite the dog beach and near shops and cafe and restaurants. Great spot and dog friendly.
Handy to shops.golf course and all the magnificent scenery. Spacious sites and I liked the ensuite facilities.

Stayed about a week in a powered site, great caravan park, highly maintained, toilet and showers are clean and the staff were friendly. Location is great across the road from the beach. Would def recommend:)
Very close to all attractions. Safe park just across from beach
4th time staying here and always a great place to camp. Good camp kitchen and amenities. Close walk to IGA and the Pub

Great place to stay. The location is fantastic. Right across from the water and really close to the pub, foreshore playground and everything else Kalbarri town has to offer. We stayed for 6 nights and saw good planning and thought, going into site bookings. They seemed to be deliberately spacing people out where possible. The ablutions we were closest too was pretty old and small but still fully functional. Not much further the other way was the another ablution block that was absolutely top notch. All great sized shower/toilet unisex rooms so great for families.  Playground could be better and the roads made to bitumen to make it more kid friendly for bike riding but to be honest it’s certainly no deal breaker for us. Highly recommend Tasman for the price, site, services, location and we would happily stay again.
Lovely friendly site cheerful checking in lady plenty of room
Good for sleeping in a tent, not too difficult to get the pegs in the ground. Good amenities.
Great park with nice sites.
Super schöner und sauberer Campingplatz mit appartments auf dem Platz, Empfehlung
OK
Will be a top tourist park when swimming pool is covered and trees are a bit more mature,  but still an awesome place to visit as it is.

Après 2 nuits dans ce camping, je vous le recommande les yeux fermés. La dame a la réception est très agréable, le camping est situé juste en face de la baie, des perroquets et des walabis font leur petite vie auprès des campeurs, petit plus pour moi. Les toilettes et salles de bain sont très propres, une bonne pression d’eau (quel bonheur !) Il y a également des barbecues à différents endroits dans le camping ainsi qu’une cuisine équipée de deux taques au gaz, deux barbecues, 3 éviers et un frigo pour y ranger vos aliments ou boissons pendant que vous cuisiner, il y a également de grande table où vous pourrez manger. J’étais en van, super expérience pour moi. Le prix est entre 45 et 50 $ à cette période de l’année.
Lovely
Stayed on a large Caravan site with grass & shade cloth. Nice park & shady. Amenities clean & Staff very friendly

Campsite near the sea. Facilities clean but very old. Narrow showers. Kitchen (open only) just few seats, not very equipped. Powered site with sand around. Pretty quiet. No TV room, no playground. Wifi connection not too bad.

This would have definitely been one of our best camping experience in WA if it wasn’t for people stealing food from the fridge. Such a shame in a camping.
Otherwise amenities were nice and location was great.

Don't come here!!!
It's 11pm and some rude people have the music so loud that makes you impossible to sleep. Staff disappeared. Small kitchen no freezer. Cars driving fast. I'm sure there are much better places where to stay in Kalbarry. Really disappointed
Stayed last week for two nights in one of the cabins. Really good value for money, clean room and great location. Would definitely recommend if you’re wanting somewhere to stay in Kalbarri!
Hermoso lugar, los baños siempre limpios al igual que todas las instalaciones! Buena ubicación! Recomiendo
Great Location & super clean & lots of shadey spots to sit under, will definitely return.

We will definitely come back !
The teams were very friendly and professional.
The cleaning team does an outstanding job, the bathroom cubicles were neat at all times.
We booked a drive through site as we were going to arrive after dark. Turns out all sites seem easy to reverse in even if you have a big set up.
The park in general is a mix of an old 'family ran' style park with new features and signs as they're now part of the Tasman Holiday Parks.
This park is right in the centre of town, across from the beach. Walking distance to food, pubs, shops & pelican feeding. Friendly, helpful staff, clean & tidy park & amenities.

Good location in town.
Pretty quiet. Toilet and shower in good condition.
Kitchen a bit small.

We loved our experience with this caravan park. Ladies at reception were very helpful and friendly, gave us a drill to assist with our tent as the ground was hard on powered site.
Kitchen, showers and toilets are super clean and have plenty of space, there is a little playground for little ones,the park itself in a walking distance from to the ocean and beaches, pelican feeding point, other playgrounds, cafe and grocery shop. We observed lots of kangaroos in the morning and bobtail lizard.
You’ll have everything there for nice and relaxing getaway.

Great position. Quiet and clean.
2nd visit and would definitely return
Plenty of room, quite a lot of shade and ticks all the boxes for myself, wife and Kelpie dog.
Good location.  Friendly atmosphere.  Close to beach and Cafe

Van site 97 pretty location with bougainvillea surrounds  connivence of bbq nearby
Facilities good being ensuite rooms

Great place to stay.
Staff are really friendly and helpful.

Perfect location, just off the beach.
The amenities a bit out dated but hopefully with new ownership they get upgraded.

Highly recommend staying here, great little spot.
Nice park & location is close to a sheltered bay.
Lovely staff,beautiful park,the amenities amazing congratulations to all and thank you.

Great spot.
Lobster tour is a must do.
Very well maintained park. Ablutions very clean. Friendly staff
Great location.  Staff helpful and informative.  Great value
Central to town, supermarket and cafes, hotel etc. But ablutions looking dated and need refurbishing by this new owner. Park always busy.
Great place opposite river great amenities and coffee shop very close, easy to walk into town shops
Camped here for a week. Fantastic location, spotless bathrooms. Camp kitchen well equipped. Walking distance to shops, beach. Great location. Staff are amazing!! Will definitely go  back there.
Very good location, walking distance to everywhere, very nice ablutions
Site's could be a bit bigger. However very nice, amenities are good. Very accomaditing and friendly staff.
Camped here overnight, great location.
Nice caravan park. Drive through sites down the back are good.

Had park site fantastic close to clean amenities. Park is located close to all entertainment and beach activities
Staff friendly. Would stay again

The park is in a good location and there are good walks close by. The ablutions are oldish but very clean. The park is a bit like a rabbit warren and the roads and bays are not that big. We were crammed in where we were but other areas seemed to have more room. The "dogs must be kept on a leash" policy is not adhered to and we had a terrible time with a roaming dog from the bay next to us. Approaching the owner didnt help. When I tried on numerous occasions to report the loose dog, the phone calls to the office were never answered.
Advertising stated largest drive through sites in Australia. NOT. Amenities and staff excellent

Loved our stay here, local and lovely helpful staff, bathrooms could do with a makeover but overall great!
so accommodating to our group.

Really enjoyed my time here. We were on a really good site that had plenty of shade and sheltered from any strong wind.
The staff were great when we asked for extra nights and we were able to stay on the same site.
The only fault I have is the lack of  dryers ( there aren't any), and they would have been handy on the rainy days we had. Otherwise, there are lots of lines for hanging your washing.
Everything is close and just a short walk away, and the park is right across from the beach and river.
Would definitely come and stay here again.

Great holiday park with clean well maintained facilities. It’s not too big to retains a quiet feel and there is plenty of room at each site - you’re not piled on top of each other. Fantastic sunsets and the beach directly over the road. Only 30 minutes or so to Kalbarri National Park. We loved our stay here and would definitely stay again.

Très bon caravan park, nous y sommes restés 4 nuits. Localisation parfait pour visiter la côte et l’intérieur du parc. Les emplacements sont assez grands avec des arbres pour l’intimité.

Gros plus pour les cabines salle de bain, toilette et la grande cuisine partagée.
Good caravan park
We were in the caravan park. Very good amenities. Nice park
Wonderful place to stay, very clean and tidy. Close to water and shops 10/10 will be returning.
